case_title: WILLIAM SHANE WHITEHEAD VS. MARK SCHULKAMP

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-08-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-08-2016 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF WILLAM SHANE WHITEHEAD & DEFENDANT MARK SCHULKAMP. PARTIES PARTICIPATED IN AN UNSUCCESSFUL MEDIATION SESSION CONDUCTED BY STUDENTS FROM HASTING LAW SCHOOL. INVALID PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE, BUT DEFENDANT WAIVED SERVICE OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AT TODAY'S HEARING. PARTIES SIGNED THE STIPULATION FOR PRO TEM JUDGE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WHITEHEAD, WILLIAM SHANE AS TO DEFENDANT SCHULKAMP, MARK

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-19-2016 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO NOV-08-2016 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
